subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-09-14
subcodes.first_line: I have the utmost of happiness this afternoon to be present at this revered meeting
subcodes.subjects: @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @oneness; unity of religion, @maintainance of degrees in society, @equality of men and women
